title: Preserve proportionate user agency over AI action
summary: Users can preview, edit, confirm, cancel, stop, undo, retry, take over manually and escalate in proportion to impact.
guidance: Place explicit approval before external or irreversible side effects. Summarize the actual action, target and consequence, then retain an audit record and reversible checkpoint where possible.
do: Require scoped approval for external side effects
dont: Bundle materially different actions into one consent
Remove manual paths after automation begins
verification: Cancel, undo, manual-takeover, duplicate-prevention and high-risk approval tests
